base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of luigi_variants — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Luigi — palette-swap of all Mario forms (green cap + overalls). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Luigi — palette-swap of all Mario forms (green cap + overalls); same pose-set
